steps.title: Use slope-intercept form
steps.content: A line with slope $-8$ has the form $$y=-8x+b.$$

steps.title: Use the y-intercept
steps.content: The line passes through $(0,60)$, so the $y$-intercept is $60$. Therefore $b=60$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The equation is $$y=-8x+60.$$ This matches choice A.

steps.title: Check the intercept directly
steps.content: A point with $x=0$ lies on the $y$-axis, so $(0,60)$ means the intercept is $60$. The choices all have slope $-8$, so the intercept is the deciding detail.
